reference: I am experiencing moderate pain on my left side. Upon further examination, I noticed a lump that is very sore when pressed. It is approximately halfway between my hip and underarm area. I am sixty-one years of age and will be sixty-two in December. I had some reconstruction surgery four weeks ago due to breast cancer.
text: I am experiencing moderate pain on my left side. Upon first examination, I noticed a lump that is very sore when pressed. It is approximately halfway between my hip and underarm area. I am 61 years of age and will be 62 in December. I had some reconstruction surgery four weeks ago due to breast cancer.
